page_title: Shinji and Good Friends: Missions of Logic
text:
is a video game that was developed and published by GAINAX on 28 May 1999 for Microsoft Windows 95/98. It was sold for 8800 Yen (plus tax) when released.

Overview

Basically a picross game. The player can only as Shinji. From a map of Tokyo-3, he can select different levels corresponding to the characters of Asuka, Rei, Misato, Ritsuko and Kaworu. Each level offers several puzzles to complete in a limited time. The player can access the NERV Headquarters where he can view information about the series, and view its rewards and progress. He can also play go against Maya Ibuki.

Minimum Requirements:
RAM: 16MB minimum (32MB or more required)
Display: 800x600 resolution, 8-bit (256) color minimum
CD-ROM: Dual-Speed minimum (Quad-speed or faster recommended)
Audio requires PCM Soundboard
 http://web.archive.org/web/20050407094728/www.gainax.co.jp/soft/logic/index-e.html 

Characters

Shinji Ikari
Rei Ayanami
Asuka Langley Sohryu
Kaworu Nagisa
Misato Katsuragi
Ritsuko Akagi
Maya Ibuki

Trivia

The cover was illustrated by Kazuya Tsurumaki.
